'''zhoshawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:keepworthy|keepworthy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-sh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:keepworthy|keepworthy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhoshawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhoshawithi|zhoshawithi]] || [[word:zhoshawiji|zhoshawiji]] || [[word:zhoshawishi|zhoshawishi]] || [[word:zhoshawiki|zhoshawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhoshawuthuthu|zhoshawuthuthu]] || [[word:zhoshawujuju|zhoshawujuju]] || [[word:zhoshawushushu|zhoshawushushu]] || [[word:zhoshawukuku|zhoshawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhoshawuthu|zhoshawuthu]] || [[word:zhoshawuju|zhoshawuju]] || [[word:zhoshawushu|zhoshawushu]] || [[word:zhoshawuku|zhoshawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhoshawufthuf|zhoshawufthuf]] || [[word:zhoshawufjuf|zhoshawufjuf]] || [[word:zhoshawufshuf|zhoshawufshuf]] || [[word:zhoshawufkuf|zhoshawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhoshawethe|zhoshawethe]] || [[word:zhoshaweje|zhoshaweje]] || [[word:zhoshaweshe|zhoshaweshe]] || [[word:zhoshaweke|zhoshaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhoshawothotho|zhoshawothotho]] || [[word:zhoshawojojo|zhoshawojojo]] || [[word:zhoshawoshosho|zhoshawoshosho]] || [[word:zhoshawokoko|zhoshawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhoshawotho|zhoshawotho]] || [[word:zhoshawojo|zhoshawojo]] || [[word:zhoshawosho|zhoshawosho]] || [[word:zhoshawoko|zhoshawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhoshawofthof|zhoshawofthof]] || [[word:zhoshawofjof|zhoshawofjof]] || [[word:zhoshawofshof|zhoshawofshof]] || [[word:zhoshawofkof|zhoshawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhoshawĂŻfthĂŻf|zhoshawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshawĂŻfjĂŻf|zhoshawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshawĂŻfshĂŻf|zhoshawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshawĂŻfkĂŻf|zhoshawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhoshawĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhoshawĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshawĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhoshawĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshawĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhoshawĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshawĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhoshawĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhoshawĂŻfthĂŻf|zhoshawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshawĂŻfjĂŻf|zhoshawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshawĂŻfshĂŻf|zhoshawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshawĂŻfkĂŻf|zhoshawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhoshawĂŻfthĂŻf|zhoshawĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshawĂŻfjĂŻf|zhoshawĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshawĂŻfshĂŻf|zhoshawĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhoshawĂŻfkĂŻf|zhoshawĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhoshawĂŠthĂŠ|zhoshawĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhoshawĂŠjĂŠ|zhoshawĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhoshawĂŠshĂŠ|zhoshawĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhoshawĂŠkĂŠ|zhoshawĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhoshawathatha|zhoshawathatha]] || [[word:zhoshawajaja|zhoshawajaja]] || [[word:zhoshawashasha|zhoshawashasha]] || [[word:zhoshawakaka|zhoshawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhoshawatha|zhoshawatha]] || [[word:zhoshawaja|zhoshawaja]] || [[word:zhoshawasha|zhoshawasha]] || [[word:zhoshawaka|zhoshawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhoshawafthaf|zhoshawafthaf]] || [[word:zhoshawafjaf|zhoshawafjaf]] || [[word:zhoshawafshaf|zhoshawafshaf]] || [[word:zhoshawafkaf|zhoshawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhoshawasha|zhoshawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhoshawshĂ«asha|zhoshawshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhoshawroasha|zhoshawroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhoshawmuasha|zhoshawmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhoshawyaasha|zhoshawyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhoshawnkshĂ«asha|gozhoshawnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhoshawnkroasha|gozhoshawnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhoshawnkmuasha|gozhoshawnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhoshawnkyaasha|gozhoshawnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhoshashawasha|zhoshashawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhoshashawshĂ«asha|zhoshashawshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhoshashawroasha|zhoshashawroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhoshashawmuasha|zhoshashawmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhoshashawyaasha|zhoshashawyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhoshashawnkshĂ«asha|gozhoshashawnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhoshashawnkroasha|gozhoshashawnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhoshashawnkmuasha|gozhoshashawnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhoshashawnkyaasha|gozhoshashawnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zheshĂŠwasha|zheshĂŠwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zheshĂŠwshĂ«asha|zheshĂŠwshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zheshĂŠwroasha|zheshĂŠwroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zheshĂŠwmuasha|zheshĂŠwmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zheshĂŠwyaasha|zheshĂŠwyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozheshĂŠwnkshĂ«asha|gozheshĂŠwnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozheshĂŠwnkroasha|gozheshĂŠwnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozheshĂŠwnkmuasha|gozheshĂŠwnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozheshĂŠwnkyaasha|gozheshĂŠwnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhoshfawasha|zhoshfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhoshfawshĂ«asha|zhoshfawshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhoshfawroasha|zhoshfawroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhoshfawmuasha|zhoshfawmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhoshfawyaasha|zhoshfawyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhoshfawnkshĂ«asha|gozhoshfawnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhoshfawnkroasha|gozhoshfawnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhoshfawnkmuasha|gozhoshfawnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhoshfawnkyaasha|gozhoshfawnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
